surface: case-focused remission, diet, lifestyle, safety, and treatment-sequencing evidence acquisition

requirements: RA-indexed human clinical evidence or evidence review

preflight_retrieval.failure_signature: recency-only ranking admitted incidental and preclinical RA mentions
preflight_retrieval.corrective_edit: require RA-indexed human evidence/reviews, topic terms in titles, and relevance ranking

case_findings.highest_support_remission_process: confirm inflammatory activity, reconstruct treatment failure, restore treatment continuity, coordinate RA-IBD selection, apply individualized safety gates, and monitor to target
case_findings.highest_value_missing_data: objective current inflammatory disease activity plus complete DMARD exposure-response-discontinuation history
case_findings.precision_medicine_status: synovial molecular response prediction is emerging and not validated for local patient-level prescribing

clinical_status: de-identified research aid only; licensed care-team review required
